name: Jade Adelaide
description:
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
Nobody asked for this bot, but i know everyone wanted it...

I didnt have a lot of inspiration other than @Silverlock_Studies Jade bot but under a different situation.

@Silverlock_Studies bot >> https://janitorai.com/characters/5490718b-6fde-4af2-8dad-0f1f010c2c58_character-adelaide-basitin-leader
this bot is a mix of personal "experiences" and the fictional world of TwoKinds, because what better way to express my problems than to forge them into a interactable scenario for people on the internet i will never meet.

probably wont be great considering my killer hang-over when making this bot
(i need therapy)


I hope you enjoy this bot im sure it will work just as good as my others despite it being much smaller, im sure ill go back and add/adjust things as necessary

\\\\SHOUT-OUTS/////

if you like my bots you love:
